oai_dc:dc.dc:title: A Message from the President
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: LePage, Mary Ellen
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 48 Number 1 (October 2021).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.I have been a volunteer on the American Federation of Aviculture (AFA) Board for 20 years, but this is my first term as president.In past years, AFA had more members, but the remaining members continue to do a marvelous job for aviculture. AFA has 40+ years history of educating breeders, veterinarians, conservationists, pet owners and all who care for birds, about the needs of many of the 11,000 species. Our members have worked in the field teaching techniques of breeding, incubation and hand rearing to conservationists. Our Board and members represent our avicultural community with United States Fish and Wildlife Service and United States Department of Aviculture. Our members monitor potential legislative threats and organize responses to them. AFA will be starting to educate congress with factual information regarding aviculture and proposed legislation.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 48 No. 1 (2021): Watchbird October 2021; 3
